articles.author: Kevin Sweeney, Pat Forde, Bryan Fischer
articles.title: March Madness Brackets: Expert Predictions for the 2026 Men’s NCAA Tournament - Sports Illustrated
articles.description: Sports Illustrated writers make their round-by-round picks and which teams will advance to the Final Four in Indianapolis.
articles.content: March Madness is officially here. The 2026 NCAA mens tournament features a familiar team as the No. 1 overall seed: Duke. Arizona, Michigan and Florida also earned top seeds. The Gators will try to r… [+1205 chars]
